risks: Y1 (Consumption) plan is deprecated for new deployments; Azure best practices mandate Flex Consumption (FC1) which provides VNet support, faster scaling, and per-function scaling
No Application Insights resource included — Azure Functions best practices require Application Insights for monitoring, exception tracking, and dependency tracing

No managed identity configured — the plan uses Key Vault secret references with connection strings instead of User-Assigned Managed Identity with RBAC role assignments, which is the recommended authentication pattern

Key Vault purge protection is disabled (enablePurgeProtection: false) — WAF security baseline and Azure Policy both strongly recommend enabling purge protection to prevent malicious or accidental permanent deletion
Cosmos DB and Key Vault have publicNetworkAccess set to Enabled — WAF recommends private endpoints and network isolation for production workloads
Storage Account uses Standard_LRS (local redundancy only) — no zone or geo-redundancy for the Functions runtime storage
Y1 Consumption plan has a 5-minute execution timeout which may be insufficient for converting large PDF files
No diagnostic settings (Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings) configured for any resource — IaC rules require diagnostic settings for Function Apps
Cosmos DB enableAutomaticFailover is false with single-region deployment — no resilience against regional outages
correctionsRecommended: Replace Y1 (Consumption) App Service Plan with FC1 (Flex Consumption) and update Function App to use functionAppConfig with deployment.storage configuration instead of app settings
Add an Application Insights resource (Microsoft.Insights/components) and wire it to the Function App via APPLICATIONINSIGHTS_CONNECTION_STRING

Add a User-Assigned Managed Identity resource and assign RBAC roles: Storage Blob Data Owner, Storage Blob Data Contributor, Storage Queue Data Contributor, Storage Table Data Contributor, and Monitoring Metrics Publisher
Set enablePurgeProtection to true on the Key Vault resource
Add cosmos-pdf-converter-prod-001 as an explicit dependency of func-pdf-converter-prod-001 since the Function App consumes Cosmos DB connection strings
Add Microsoft.Insights/diagnosticSettings resources to capture logs for the Function App and other resources
Consider upgrading Storage Account to Standard_ZRS for zone-redundant Functions runtime storage
Evaluate enabling Cosmos DB automatic failover for improved reliability
Disable storage account local auth (key access) per IaC best practices and use managed identity instead
